requirement_topic.en: EOS Standards and GOEIC Import Conformity for Electric Batteries
requirement_topic.zh: EOS标准和GOEIC电池进口符合性
requirement_topic.zht: EOS標準和GOEIC電池進口符合性

summary.en: Egypt import acceptance should be checked against GOEIC procedures and the Egyptian Organization for Standardization and Quality (EOS) standards catalogue. GOEIC publishes a conformity-certification route for electric batteries, and its portal links to the EOS specifications guide. For BESS, the honest scope split is component-based unless a specific project or customs instrument identifies a complete BESS unit as regulated.
summary.zh: 埃及进口准入应对照GOEIC程序及埃及标准与质量组织（EOS）标准目录核验。GOEIC公布了电池符合性认证路径，其门户也链接至EOS规格指南。对于BESS，除非具体项目或海关文件将整机BESS列为受管产品，否则应按部件范围进行判断。
summary.zht: 埃及進口准入應對照GOEIC程序及埃及標準與品質組織（EOS）標準目錄核驗。GOEIC公布了電池符合性認證路徑，其入口網站也連結至EOS規格指南。對於BESS，除非具體項目或海關文件將整機BESS列為受管產品，否則應按部件範圍進行判斷。

standards_or_laws: EOS specifications guide and Egyptian standards catalogue
Import conformity assessment for listed battery products or components where in scope

summary.en: China-side battery and BESS dossiers commonly include GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, and GB/T 36558. These are useful technical references, but they do not automatically replace GOEIC / EOS import conformity review or an Egyptian customs classification.
summary.zh: 中国侧电池和BESS资料通常包括GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558。这些是有用的技术依据，但不能自动替代GOEIC/EOS进口符合性审查或埃及海关归类。
summary.zht: 中國側電池和BESS資料通常包括GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558。這些是有用的技術依據，但不能自動替代GOEIC/EOS進口符合性審查或埃及海關歸類。

gap.en: Before shipment, classify the battery cells, modules, racks, PCS, BMS, enclosure, and complete container separately. Ask the importer or customs broker to confirm whether the GOEIC electric-batteries route, an EOS Egyptian standard, or another listed-product route applies, and translate labels, manuals, and certificates into the language requested by the authority or project owner.
gap.zh: 出货前，应分别归类电芯、模组、电池架、PCS、BMS、外壳和整柜。要求进口商或报关代理确认是否适用GOEIC电池路径、EOS埃及标准或其他列明产品路径，并按主管机关或项目业主要求翻译标签、手册和证书。
gap.zht: 出貨前，應分別歸類電芯、模組、電池架、PCS、BMS、外殼和整櫃。要求進口商或報關代理確認是否適用GOEIC電池路徑、EOS埃及標準或其他列明產品路徑，並按主管機關或項目業主要求翻譯標籤、手冊和證書。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where GOEIC / EOS import conformity, customs classification, or a listed-product route applies; no cited blanket whole-unit BESS mandate confirmed
mandatory_status.cn: GB 44240-2024 is mandatory where applicable in China; GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 36558 are recommended unless made binding by regulation or contract

source.publisher: General Organization for Export and Import Control (GOEIC), Egypt

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Egypt market entry as a component and import-route exercise first. GOEIC / EOS requirements may apply to electric batteries or listed components, but a whole-container BESS mandate should not be assumed without a project, customs, or regulator citation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 埃及市场准入应首先按部件和进口路径处理。GOEIC/EOS要求可能适用于电池或列明部件，但没有项目、海关或监管引用时，不应假设整柜BESS存在统一强制要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 埃及市場准入應首先按部件和進口路徑處理。GOEIC/EOS要求可能適用於電池或列明部件，但沒有項目、海關或監管引用時，不應假設整櫃BESS存在統一強制要求。
